'''âb-k-h-k''' ('''kabakhekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yike|yike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-k-h-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yike|yike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-k-h-k
|-
! Lemma
| kabakhekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibakhekoko|thibakhekoko]] || [[word:jibakhekoko|jibakhekoko]] || [[word:shibakhekoko|shibakhekoko]] || [[word:kibakhekoko|kibakhekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubakhekoko|thuthubakhekoko]] || [[word:jujubakhekoko|jujubakhekoko]] || [[word:shushubakhekoko|shushubakhekoko]] || [[word:kukubakhekoko|kukubakhekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubakhekoko|thubakhekoko]] || [[word:jubakhekoko|jubakhekoko]] || [[word:shubakhekoko|shubakhekoko]] || [[word:kubakhekoko|kubakhekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubakhekoko|thubakhekoko]] || [[word:jubakhekoko|jubakhekoko]] || [[word:shubakhekoko|shubakhekoko]] || [[word:kubakhekoko|kubakhekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebakhekoko|thebakhekoko]] || [[word:jebakhekoko|jebakhekoko]] || [[word:shebakhekoko|shebakhekoko]] || [[word:kebakhekoko|kebakhekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobakhekoko|thothobakhekoko]] || [[word:jojobakhekoko|jojobakhekoko]] || [[word:shoshobakhekoko|shoshobakhekoko]] || [[word:kokobakhekoko|kokobakhekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobakhekoko|thobakhekoko]] || [[word:jobakhekoko|jobakhekoko]] || [[word:shobakhekoko|shobakhekoko]] || [[word:kobakhekoko|kobakhekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobakhekoko|thobakhekoko]] || [[word:jobakhekoko|jobakhekoko]] || [[word:shobakhekoko|shobakhekoko]] || [[word:kobakhekoko|kobakhekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚbakhekoko|thĂŚbakhekoko]] || [[word:jĂŚbakhekoko|jĂŚbakhekoko]] || [[word:shĂŚbakhekoko|shĂŚbakhekoko]] || [[word:kĂŚbakhekoko|kĂŚbakhekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabakhekoko|thathabakhekoko]] || [[word:jajabakhekoko|jajabakhekoko]] || [[word:shashabakhekoko|shashabakhekoko]] || [[word:kakabakhekoko|kakabakhekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabakhekoko|thabakhekoko]] || [[word:jabakhekoko|jabakhekoko]] || [[word:shabakhekoko|shabakhekoko]] || [[word:kabakhekoko|kabakhekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabakhekoko|thabakhekoko]] || [[word:jabakhekoko|jabakhekoko]] || [[word:shabakhekoko|shabakhekoko]] || [[word:kabakhekoko|kabakhekoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shabakhekithi|shabakhekithi]] || [[word:shabakhekiji|shabakhekiji]] || [[word:shabakhekishi|shabakhekishi]] || [[word:shabakhekiki|shabakhekiki]]

|-
